Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PRoX2011/x16-PRos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PRoX2011/x16-PRos
Language: assembly
Simple 16 bit (real mode) operating system writen in NASM from scratch

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Rangi42/polishedcrystal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Rangi42/polishedcrystal
Language: assembly
An upgrade to Pokémon Crystal. Brings features and content up to date, and adds some original content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SheerSt/pokewilds
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SheerSt/pokewilds
Language: assembly
PokeWilds - A Gen 2 Game/Engine using libGDX

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/arrow-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/arrow-go
Language: assembly
Official Go implementation of Apache Arrow

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apple/swift-crypto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apple/swift-crypto
Language: assembly
Open-source implementation of a substantial portion of the API of Apple CryptoKit suitable for use on Linux platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apple/swift-nio-ssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apple/swift-nio-ssl
Language: assembly
TLS Support for SwiftNIO, based on BoringSSL.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/aws-lc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/aws-lc
Language: assembly
AWS-LC is a general-purpose cryptographic library maintained by the AWS Cryptography team for AWS and their customers. It іs based on code from the Google BoringSSL project and the OpenSSL project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: boostorg/context
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/boostorg/context
Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Crystal_Legacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Crystal_Legacy
Language: assembly
This is a Pokémon Rom Hack made by TheSmithPlays with the intended purpose of fixing Pokémon Crystal into a more polished experience while staying true to the vision of Generation 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Yellow_Legacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Yellow_Legacy
Language: assembly
This is a Pokémon Rom Hack made by TheSmithPlays with the intended purpose of fixing Pokémon Yellow into a more polished experience while staying true to the vision of Generation 1's Yellow.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chrislgarry/Apollo-11
Language: assembly
Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espressif/esp-dl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espressif/esp-dl
Language: assembly
Espressif deep-learning library for AIoT applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiteshchoudhary/open-source-contribution
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiteshchoudhary/open-source-contribution
Language: assembly
A repo to contribute in open source via README only. A dream repo for open source beginner

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openhwgroup/core-v-verif
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openhwgroup/core-v-verif
Language: assembly
Functional verification project for the CORE-V family of RISC-V cores.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openhwgroup/cva6
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openhwgroup/cva6
Language: assembly
The CORE-V CVA6 is a highly configurable, 6-stage RISC-V core for both application and embedded applications. Application class configurations are capable of booting Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pret/pokecrystal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pret/pokecrystal
Language: assembly
Disassembly of Pokémon Crystal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pret/pokered
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pret/pokered
Language: assembly
Disassembly of Pokémon Red/Blue

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supranational/blst
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supranational/blst
Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: assembly
